mainEntity.name: Can Houston law firms use schema markup to rank in Google Gemini referrals?
mainEntity.text: Can Houston law firms use schema markup to rank in Google Gemini referrals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Houston firms can use FAQPage and HowTo schema markup on websites to structure Q&A content, making it easier for Google Gemini to cite them in referral answers for local legal queries.[2]

suggestedAnswer.text: Implement JSON-LD schema for FAQs like 'top Houston personal injury lawyers' on your site. Target Gemini by answering conversational questions in question-answer format. Combine with directory optimization. This boosts visibility without paid ads. Track via Google Search Console. Competitors may copy—protect unique content. Note: Schema alone insufficient; pair with reviews and backlinks.[2]

name: Schema Markup for Houston Firms in Google Gemini Referrals
